name: micro-vm-games
description: Multiplayer Asteroids on AWS Lambda MicroVMs

scripts.install:all: for d in shared gameserver frontend src/control-plane; do (cd "$d" && npm install); done
scripts.clean: for d in shared gameserver frontend src/control-plane; do (cd "$d" && npm run clean --if-present); done
scripts.typecheck: for d in shared gameserver frontend src/control-plane; do (cd "$d" && npm run build); done
